title: Chinchilli Chinchilla
description: You’ll believe cartoons are real when you hang with Chinchilli. Hope he doesn’t get into too much trouble!
quote: I’ve never juggled chainsaws before, but what could go wrong?
altHero: Chinchilli, a cartoon chinchilla wearing a scarf and sneakers
alt1: Chinchilli looking at a bucket on the beach
alt2: Chinchilli running frantically with the bucket on his head
alt3: Chinchilli with the bucket on his head, falling through the sky
alt4: wide shot showing Chinchilli is falling next to a building and into a dumpster
